# STRAT.062 ? Stoic Practice

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** self_development
**Domain:** SELF_DEVELOPMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Dichotomy of control; negative visualization; view from above; memento mori; voluntary discomfort; journaling

## Application
Focus on controllable; practice premeditation; cosmic perspective; remember mortality; embrace discomfort; daily reflection

## Key Values
- Control focus
- Perspective
- Memento mori
- Voluntary hardship
- Daily practice
